name: Ukufakwa kweNasopharyngeal Airway (NPA).
description: Ukufakwa kwendlela yomoya yempumlo eguquguqukayo yokugcina i-patency yomoya kwisigulane esingekho zingqondweni okanye semiconscious.
steps: Khetha ubungakanani obufanelekileyo be-NPA (umlinganiselo ukusuka kwimpumlo ukuya kwinwebu yendlebe).
Thambisa i-NPA ngesisa ngesithambiso esinyibilikayo emanzini okanye ngesaline.
Faka isikhonkwane sokhuseleko kwiflange ukuba ayikabikho (ithintela ukulangazelela).
Faka ngobunono kwikhala lasekunene (bevel ukuya kwiseptum), uhambela phambili ngokungqamene nenkalakahla.
Ukuqhubela phambili de i-flange iphumle malunga nempumlo.
Phinda ubeke isigulane (indawo yokubuyisela ukuba akukho nkxalabo yomgogodla) kwaye uphinde uhlolisise indlela yomoya.
Ukuba ukuxhathisa kuhlangatyezwana nayo, zama impumlo yasekhohlo.
warnings: Ichanekile ekurhanelweni kokakayi lwe-basilar (amehlo e-raccoon, uphawu lwedabi, i-CSF rhinorrhea).
I-NPA sesona sigulana singekho zingqondweni sesona sihlomelo sendlela yomoya yokuqala -- i-OPA inokubangela ukugabha kwizigulana zingekho zingqondweni.
